releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Release Notes

## Features

* Generate AI-powered content directly within your notes.
* Select text and use the ribbon button or command palette to trigger AI generation.
* Configure your Google AI Studio API key and select the AI model (e.g., `gemini-1.5-flash`).

## Usage

* Select text and generate content using the ribbon button or command palette.
* The selected text is replaced with the generated content in your note.

**Future Enhancements**

* Integration with various AI APIs (ChatGPT, Claude, Llama).
* More control over generated content with options for insertion, templates, etc.
